summary: CRITICAL MISSING ARTIFACTS: (1) No bats test file (test-version-bumper.bats) referenced in workflow; (2) No test fixtures (fixtures/version-*.txt, fixtures/commits-*.txt, fixtures/package-*.json) that workflow depends on; (3) No act-result.txt required output. MAJOR VIOLATIONS: (1) Workflow action not SHA-pinned (uses `actions/checkout@v4` instead of full 40-char SHA + release date per requirements); (2) No TDD evidence—task required failing test FIRST, then implementation, but only finished script provided; (3) No actionlint validation shown. DESIGN: Workflow test steps are highly repetitive (lines ~30–60: same pattern for 6 test cases with file copies, script invocation, version assertions—should factor into composite action or helper script). Core script logic is sound (parsing, bumping, changelog) and well-commented, but deliverable is incomplete and cannot run.
